params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Dine. Focus tightly on: dining table, pendant light above the dining area, dining chairs, round oak dining table, rattan pendant centered above table, bay/windowed panels, linen-upholstered chairs, rattan pendant, bay/windowed dining panels. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm, family-friendly Japandi scheme that balances Scandinavian warmth and Japanese restraint. Warm neutrals, low-profile furniture, woven textures and tactile ceramics create a serene backdrop. Prioritize negative space, natural materials, and a small dedicated work corner while keeping circulation and crib placement safe. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
